environment.serviceStrategy: use repo-local dev/test commands; ask if services are required

checks.command: node --check chromux.mjs && bash -n test.sh && node chromux.mjs help && npm pack --dry-run
checks.passCriteria: Static checks, `node chromux.mjs help`, and `npm pack --dry-run` prove the CLI, help surface, and package surface remain coherent

testModeContract.covers: CLI syntax, help surface, package allowlist, docs consistency

contract.method: `node --check chromux.mjs && bash -n test.sh && node chromux.mjs help && npm pack --dry-run`
contract.passCriteria: Static checks, `node chromux.mjs help`, and `npm pack --dry-run` prove the CLI, help surface, and package surface remain coherent
contract.sensitiveDataPolicy: no secrets or browser profile data required

checks.passCriteria: Automated tests prove adaptive scheduling, readiness helpers, receipt redaction, diagnosis states, and snippet contracts against deterministic fixtures

testModeContract.covers: scheduler, readiness, receipts, snippets, diagnosis, redaction regressions

contract.passCriteria: Automated tests prove adaptive scheduling, readiness helpers, receipt redaction, diagnosis states, and snippet contracts against deterministic fixtures
contract.sensitiveDataPolicy: isolated `CHROMUX_HOME`; no raw typed text, tokens, cookies, or inline code stored

checks.passCriteria: Real Chrome smoke flows prove bundled QA, crawl worker reuse, profile recovery, watch diagnostics, and cleanup behavior in an isolated `CHROMUX_HOME` using benchmark-owned local fixtures

testModeContract.covers: real Chrome behavior for QA, crawl, profile lifecycle, diagnostics
testModeContract.humanDecision: final confidence that behavior is Chrome-real

contract.artifact: command-log plus benchmark JSON file under `.hoyeon/implement/chromux-dominant-browser-automation/artifacts/logs/`
contract.passCriteria: Real Chrome smoke flows prove bundled QA, crawl worker reuse, profile recovery, watch diagnostics, and cleanup behavior in an isolated `CHROMUX_HOME` using benchmark-owned local fixtures
contract.safeProbe: deterministic localhost fixture server started and stopped by benchmark harness
contract.sensitiveDataPolicy: isolated temporary profile; benchmark artifacts must redact text entry and inline runner code

checks.passCriteria: Benchmark artifacts report p50/p95 latency, throughput, retry/failure classification, and resource snapshots against baseline-derived budgets

testModeContract.covers: cold/warm command latency, batch throughput, resource budgets

contract.covers: R1, R2, R5, R7, AC1, AC2, AC4, AC5, T1, T3
contract.artifact: benchmark JSON file and command-log under `.hoyeon/implement/chromux-dominant-browser-automation/artifacts/logs/`
contract.passCriteria: Benchmark artifacts report p50/p95 latency, throughput, retry/failure classification, and resource snapshots against baseline-derived budgets
contract.sensitiveDataPolicy: isolated temporary profile; no production pages or user data

checks.passCriteria: README, install docs, `skills/chromux`, and `skills/chromux-work` teach the fastest safe path and match `chromux help`

testModeContract.covers: README, install, skills, and orchestration guidance

contract.passCriteria: README, install docs, `skills/chromux`, and `skills/chromux-work` teach the fastest safe path and match `chromux help`
contract.safeProbe: local file and help-output inspection only
contract.sensitiveDataPolicy: no secrets or browser profile data required

checks.passCriteria: If implementation delivery is approved, branch, PR URL, diff scope, and CI result prove the change is reviewable and unrelated artifacts are excluded

testModeContract.covers: future PR URL, branch diff, and CI status if implementation is shipped
testModeContract.humanDecision: PR creation and CI spend require explicit implementation approval

contract.passCriteria: If implementation delivery is approved, branch, PR URL, diff scope, and CI result prove the change is reviewable and unrelated artifacts are excluded
contract.safeProbe: GitHub metadata only after explicit ship request
contract.sensitiveDataPolicy: PR body and logs must not include local secrets, cookies, tokens, or unpushed `/Users/...` visual artifact paths
